lines: Man' ishobora byose, Umv' uko nkwinginga : Umpishurire Yesu, Meny' ibyo yankoreye.
Yarahemuwe Ku Musaraba: Mpumur' amaso, ndebe Kw ari jye yazize,
Mbony' inkon' akubiswe N'amahwa yambaye; Mbonye na za mbereri N'umutim'
Yemeye kwiranguzaIgikombe kibi : Yakinyoye kubwanjye, Maz' amp' ubugingo
Reb' uyu Mucunguzi Urupfu yapfuye  Nta n'ikibi yakoze: Nuko sinzarimbuka !
Ni jyewe yabambiwe,Uwamugomeye. Yesu, ndagushimiye : Non' uture muri jye.
Yesu, we kunkundira Ko ngusigirira. Ku Musaraba wawe, Ni ho nkuy' ubugingo.
Mana, ndagushimira K'utimanye Yesu, Ngw amfire nkiraniwe. Yewe, warankunze
